---
title: "People"
toc: false
---

This page introduces the AD-Genomics-Cardiff team. Replace placeholder entries
with confirmed names, roles, biographies, and links when those details are ready.

---

## Team overview

AD-Genomics-Cardiff is part of UK DRI Cardiff and focuses on integrative
analysis of genetic and multi-omics data in Alzheimer’s disease research.

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12}
::: {.card}
### Team scope

- Integrative analysis across genetics and molecular data
- Methods spanning GWAS, polygenic risk, sequencing, and downstream interpretation
- Collaborative work across computational, statistical, and biological domains
:::
:::
:::

---

## Team members

Use one card per person or role group. The entries below are intentionally generic
placeholders so the page can be reviewed before specific biographies are added.

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12}
::: {.card}
### Placeholder team lead or senior investigator

- **Role:** Placeholder leadership role
- **Focus:** Placeholder summary of research direction and expertise
- **Links:** Placeholder team page, group page, or contact link
:::
:::
:::

---

## Research and technical roles

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12}
::: {.card}
### Placeholder researchers and analysts

- **Research staff:** Placeholder names, roles, and topic areas
- **Computational support:** Placeholder details for analysis, pipelines, or data integration
- **Students and trainees:** Placeholder details where appropriate
:::
:::
:::

---

## Collaboration

Add confirmed partner teams, institutes, and points of contact here when ready.

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12}
::: {.card}
### Working with the team

- **Affiliation:** UK DRI Cardiff and related collaborators
- **Opportunities:** Placeholder note for collaboration, training, or student interest
- **Contact:** Use the shared team contact details from the site links
:::
:::
:::
